text.tspan: BREAKING NEWS
@unhappychoice merges 227 commits in 7 days. Keyboards reportedly exhausted.
TUESDAY SURGE
@unhappychoice drops 108 commits in a single day. Markets in freefall.
MASS APPROVAL
@unhappychoice approves 56 PRs in one week. Zero rejections. Zero mercy.
ESM CRISIS
@unhappychoice battles commander 15's ESM-only mandate. Dynamic import saves the day.
PORTFOLIO SWEEP
@unhappychoice updates 20+ repos spanning Rust, JS, Ruby, Java and Kotlin. Unstoppable.
META MOMENT
@unhappychoice reviews the tool generating this very report. The ouroboros is complete.
LLM PRICING WATCH
@unhappychoice syncs AI model costs in splashboard. Sources say it's not cheap.
NO SURVIVORS
@unhappychoice leaves no dependency un-bumped. rubocop 1.88.1 hits six repos simultaneously.
